articles.title: Nvidia chases $200B CPU market with AI agent PCs from Microsoft, Dell, and HP
articles.summary: If Nvidia has cracked a way to bring AI agents easily, safely, and usefully to the masses, it could — and should — be big.

articles.title: Florida sues OpenAI, Sam Altman, in first-of-its-kind lawsuit over violent incidents
articles.summary: The lawsuit partially revolves around a shooting at Florida State University last year, and ChatGPT's alleged role in the incident.

articles.title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
articles.summary: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.

articles.title: Canada Post employees ratify contracts, ending labor uncertainty
US manufacturing expands to highest level since May 2022: PMI
Our views on AI policy and political advocacy
articles.summary: Our approach to AI policy and political advocacy, transparency, support for thoughtful regulation and AI safety, and that no outside political group speaks on the company’s behalf.

articles.title: Victorian minister under fire for writing 33 character references including for taxi driver who assaulted women
articles.summary: Labor’s Luba Grigorovitch says she regrets six of the character references and vows never to write another

articles.title: 黄仁勋发布Alpamayo 2 Super：自动驾驶黑箱终于被打开了
articles.summary: “Alpamayo标志着汽车从‘单纯驾驶’迈入‘安全推理’时代。”  黄仁勋在英伟达GTC台北2026大会现场这样说道。  在近两个小时的演讲中，他不仅发布了专为智能体设计的Vera CPU、AI工厂实战指南DSX平台、RTX Spark超级芯片等产品，更在汽车行业最为关注的自动驾驶领域推出了开放推理模型——NVIDIA Alpamayo 2 Super。

articles.title: AI推理带动存储需求爆发，电子ETF天弘(159997)标的指数涨超2%，半日净申购400万份
articles.summary: 截至2026年6月2日11:30，电子ETF天弘(159997)资金净申购已达400万份，换手5.87%，成交8702.60万元。跟踪的中证电子指数(930652)
